headline: Is Crown Castle (CCI) Pricing Reflect Its DCF Upside After Recent Share Price Stability
summary: If you are wondering whether Crown Castle's share price around US$90.43 still reflects its real worth, you are not alone. This article walks through what the current market price might be implying about its value. Over the past week the stock returned 1.0%, with a 5.0% return over the last 30 days, while the year to date return is 2.0% and the 1 year return sits at a 2.7% decline, set against a 15.9% decline over 3 years and a 28.8% decline over 5 years.
